title: Amaal and Duas for 1st eve (before 1st Day) of the Ramadan Month

duas.mainTitle: First Night / Eve of Ramadan Month
duas.details: O Allah! Make this moon as a faith and protection for us in it we are safe and sustenance is increased and the sick are cured. O Allah! By Your grace, grant us the power to fast, pray and recite the Quran in it. O Allah! Make it safe for us and from our side and grant us Your protection in this month.
duas.title: First Night / Eve of Ramadan Month
Highly Recommended Duas
duas.subtitle: Highly Recommended Duas for the 1st night / eve of the month of Ramadan

buttons.subtext: Duas to be recited when the moon of the month of Ramadan is sighted
Dua by Imam Jaf'ar as sadiq (as) for starting the month of Ramadan
Highly recommended dua from Sahifa al-sajjadiyah by Imam Sajjad (as)

duas.title: Recommended Acts
duas.subtitle: Amaal on the 1st night / eve of the Holy month of Ramadan

items.title: Amaal / Acts
items.content:
Ghusl - Bath
Perform a Ghusl / prescribed bath on the 1st night / eve of the holy month of Ramadan

Recite Holy Quran
It is highly advisable to recite the Holy Qur'an very frequently at the first hours of the Month of Ramadhan.

Ziyarat of Imam Husain (as)
It is highly recommended to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him) so that the sins will be forgiven and the like of the reward of those who undertake the Hajj and the `Umrah in that year will be recorded for him.
items.subtitle: Acts to perform on the 1st eve / night

items.title: Salaat and Duas
items.content:
Four Rakah
Offer a Four Rak`ah prayer reciting in each Rak`ah Surah of al-Fatihah and Surah Tawheed 15 times

Two Rakah
Offer a two Rak`ah prayer reciting in each Rak`ah Surah of al-Fatihah and Surah of al-An`am (No. 6) and pray to Almighty Allah for security against ailments

10 duas - 1st eve of Ramadan
items.subtitle: Collection of salaat / namaaz for the 1st eve of the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Daily Salah / Namaaz and Dua
duas.subtitle: Duas and Salaat / Namaaz for all nights in the holy month of Ramadan

buttons.subtext: Recite these duas on every night of the holy month of Ramadan
Offer this 2 rakah on every night of the holy month of Ramadan
It is highly advisable to recite the Holy Qur'an very frequently in the Month of Ramadhan.
